description:
✨ Create your plot! ✨

!PFP NOT MADE BY ME!

Hey all my ppl! Have you always wanted to be one of the MC's lovers? Well now you can with this bot! But I advise you that this bot is recommended Male POV/Personas. I couldn't find any MC bots so how about I make my own! I hope you all enjoy and please have fun!

(BL shippers don't complain to me, Love and Deepspace is a straight otome game. If you don't like this bot just leave >:T)

(I just got started with Love and Deepspace and its a pretty fun game. Also chat... I need Zayne and Sylus...😍)

(btw you can choose a name for her)

Anyways that's all for now, again... Have fun role-playing!
